title: Ctrl Q
description: This mod forces "CTRL+Q" to be used to drop a stack of item
body:
This mod forces CTRL to be used to drop a stack of item. It is also basically overwriting the MacOS "CMD" key when dropping a stack of item. (And so skipping the CMD+Q MacOS shortcut)

Available on Forge(1.12.2) and Fabric(1.14 to latest). (Fabric versions 1.14 to 1.19.2 are v1.8. Fabric 1.19.3+ is in v1.9)

*For non-MacOS users, this mod is basically useless. Sorry !

(yes, this mod is still suported, it just doesn't require any updates!)

## Since [25w41a, MC-22882](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-22882) has been patched! This mod will therefore no longer be required from 1.21.11+
